name: Comparison Layout Template

auto_tags.lighting: Soft, even studio lighting with minimal shadows, creating a bright and clean appearance.
auto_tags.mood: Informative, healthy, clean, comparative, appealing, and educational.
auto_tags.composition: The image uses a vertical split-screen layout to compare two distinct food presentations. On the left, three identical poke bowls are stacked vertically. On the right, three multi-compartment meal prep containers are arranged diagonally. Text overlays at the top and bottom frame the comparison, with logos placed in the bottom right, creating an asymmetrical but balanced composition.
auto_tags.scene: A clean studio or advertisement setting, focused entirely on the food items and comparative information.
auto_tags.style: Clean, modern, infographic, food photography, promotional, illustrative graphic design.

notes: This vs That comparison ad layout from Tricia
